name: Olive Garden Pizza Bianco
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the filling in a bowl and mix thoroughly.
2. Divide the filling into two portions and spread each on separate crusts.
3. Prepare the toppings by dividing them into two portions as well.
4. Sprinkle green onions, black olives, and tomatoes over the crusts.
5. Top with mozzarella and Parmesan cheese.
6. Sprinkle oregano and basil over the toppings.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 8 to 10 minutes until the filling is hot and the cheese has melted.
8. Cut into 6 wedges.
